attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft a crafting table without first obtaining enough oak planks. Specifically, you needed 4 oak planks to craft a crafting table, but you only had 1, 2, and 3 planks at various points. Additionally, you mined cobblestone and picked up more oak logs unnecessarily, which did not help progress towards crafting a crafting table. To fix this, ensure you gather the required 4 oak planks before attempting to craft a crafting table. Once you have the crafting table, use it to make a wooden pickaxe, which will allow you to mine iron ore and continue crafting rails.

attempts.reflection: You repeated the action of mining oak logs and crafting oak planks multiple times without progressing to the next necessary step. Specifically, you mined and crafted oak planks for no reason after successfully crafting a wooden pickaxe. Additionally, you tried to mine iron ore repeatedly before having a stone pickaxe, which is a prerequisite. To fix this, ensure you craft a stone pickaxe before attempting to mine iron ore. Also, after obtaining the stone pickaxe, directly craft the crafting table and then proceed to make the wooden pickaxe only once you have the necessary oak planks.
